def solve(nums, k)
    sorted = nums.sort

    max_len = 1
    for i in 0...n
        target = sorted[i] * k
        low = i
        high = n - 1
        best = i

                low = mid + 1
            else
                high = mid - 1
            end

        current_len = best - i + 1
        max_len = [max_len, current_len].max
    end
    return n - max_len
end
